raw_text: {"intent":"extract_person_preferences_from_table","decision":"commit_with_caution","memory_cards":[{"kind":"preference","statement":"Sam's preference is Bill Evans.","confidence":"medium","entities":[{"name":"Sam","type":"person","role":"subject"},{"name":"Bill Evans","type":"preference_target","role":"object"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Sam","predicate":"prefers","object":"Bill Evans"}]},{"kind":"preference","statement":"Daniele's preference is knowledge graphs.","confidence":"medium","entities":[{"name":"Daniele","type":"person","role":"subject"},{"name":"Knowledge graphs","type":"topic","role":"object"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Daniele","predicate":"prefers","object":"Knowledge graphs"}]}],"entity_resolution":{"action":"create_or_link_by_name","entity_id":null,"reason":"No prior entity identifiers are provided; resolve conservatively by name only."},"conflict_classification":"none","answer":"Extracted two preference memories from the table.","citations":["table: Sam | Bill Evans","table: Daniele | Knowledge graphs"],"repair_options":["Lower confidence if preferences are known to be temporary or context-specific.","Require source context or timestamp before durable storage.","Link to existing person entities if stable identifiers become available."],"receipt":{"success":true,"details":["Parsed 2 rows from the input table.","Created 2 preference memory cards with medium confidence.","No conflicts or superseded facts were present in the input."]}}
